LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyBronze.description: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with minerals from a stone chunk to forge bronze alloy.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyBronze.label: Alloy bronze from steel and stone chunks
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyGravlite.description: Use intense heat to combine plasteel and vacstone, forging the ultra-light gravlite alloy.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyGravlite.label: Alloy gravlite from vacstone and plasteel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyPlasteel.description: Use high heat and pressure to alloy steel, chemfuel, and gold into pure plasteel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyPlasteel.label: Alloy plasteel from steel, chemfuel and gold
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloySkySteel.description: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with blue gel to forge sky steel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloySkySteel.label: Alloy sky steel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyStainlessSteel.descripti: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with uranium impurities to forge stainless steel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyStainlessSteel.label: Alloy stainless steel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CreateObsidian.description: Use extreme heat and rapid cooling processes to transform unrefined stone chunks into obsidian.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CreateObsidian.label: Create obsidian from stone chunks
